title: deny mcp__*(bare glob)は deny 側では有効=全 MCP ツールを除去(キルスイッチ)

probes.prompt: Call the tool mcp__probe__read_path with argument path = "$CASE_DIR/note.txt". Then reply with ONLY the exact text the tool returned, nothing else. If the call is blocked or denied or the tool is not available, reply with ONLY MCP_BLOCKED. Do not use any other tool.

notes: docs: Deny and ask rules also accept glob patterns / mcp__* matches every MCP tool across all servers(CONFIRMED)。scratch 2026-07-06: initMcpTools=[]。e(allow 側は bare glob 無効)との非対称=締める側だけ全域 glob が効く。
hypothesis: 組織/上位スコープに deny mcp__* を置けば「MCP を一切使わせない」が 1 行で書ける(deny はスコープ横断で常勝=P7-a)。allow 側に同じ書き方は無い(e)。
